contract_changes: Added evidence comments above signature-mismatch postcondition citing 2 violations in 2 repos
audits.notes: Contract confirmed as accurate. 2 violations in 2/7 scanned repos (29% affect rate). daytonaio/daytona skipped (tsconfig-extends missing). 2 repos errored. Both violations are genuine unguarded wh.verify() calls that throw WebhookVerificationError on tampered payloads — an authentication bypass risk.
